name: A Guard's Request
description: The town guard wants you to check the roads beyond the gate and report back.

phases.description: Scout the roads north and west of town
phases.completion_text: Good work. The roads seem clear for now. But one more thing...

phases.description: Speak with the hooded wanderer near the Northern Gate
phases.completion_text: Interesting. I'll keep an eye on that one. You've done well, citizen.

name: The Coin's Secret
description: Something feels unusual about these gold coins. Perhaps someone in town knows their origin.

phases.description: Find someone who might know about these unusual coins

objectives.description: Ask the hooded wanderer about the coins

phases.completion_text: Ah, you found one of my coins. Keep it — you've earned it. The less said about where it came from, the better.
